prompt: A clear conceptual loom diagram for Ernst Junger's distinction between measurable time and fateful time. Show measurable time as straight warp threads: regular, structural, ordered. Show fateful time as weft threads entering irregularly and creating the real pattern. Serious philosophical illustration, restrained palette, high legibility, no decorative fantasy elements, no collage, no photoreal people, no interface chrome, no handwritten text. Leave any labels minimal or omit them entirely. One coherent diagram.
